items.title: Migrate route-parsers.ts to modular framework plugins
items.body: route-parsers.ts is 518 lines with parsers for 7 frameworks (Flask, FastAPI, Express, Next.js, SvelteKit, Nuxt, Remix). Adding new frameworks requires modifying this central file, violating open/closed principle. Migrate to plugin architecture: src/analyzer/route-parsers/{framework}/parser.ts with common interface.

items.title: Replace regex parsing with AST for all languages
items.body: External review identified regex-based parsing as primary accuracy limitation (score 6.5/10). Currently only Python uses tree-sitter AST (100% accuracy). TypeScript, JavaScript, Go, Rust, Java, C#, PHP all use regex patterns. Expanding tree-sitter coverage would boost accuracy rating +1.5 points and match CodeQL-level precision. See scanner-quality autoresearch baselines for comparison.

items.title: Add data-flow and type-flow analysis
items.body: Current system lacks deep semantic analysis (type-flow, data-flow, symbolic execution). Review suggests this limits technical depth score to 7/10 vs CodeQL. Adding data-flow tracking would enable dead code detection, security vulnerability analysis, and more precise impact analysis. Would differentiate from Semgrep pattern-matching approach.

items.title: Introduce plugin system for custom detectors
items.body: Plugin system implemented via WO-PLUGIN-SYSTEM-001. Provides: PluginRegistry for lifecycle management, npm/local/config loaders, CodeDetector interface extending FrameworkDetector, GraphHook for custom edges, coderef-plugin.json manifest, CLI --plugins flag, example plugin (@coderef/example-detector), and comprehensive API documentation. Enables third-party extensions without core modifications.

items.title: Add minimal UI layer for graph exploration to my-code tenant
items.body: Build interactive graph explorer for CodeRef data targeting Entity monorepo's my-code tenant (Entity/apps/web/app/my-code/). Consumes CODEREF-CORE .coderef/graph.json via API endpoint. Features: visualize dependency graphs, navigate element relationships, inspect API routes. Integration point: my-code/page.tsx currently shows ProjectViewPage - add graph visualization tab. Will differentiate from static foundation-docs markdown output.

items.title: Implement incremental scanning with file-watcher
items.body: External review (9/10 utility, 8/10 performance) suggests incremental scanning for enterprise monorepos. As projects grow, full re-scan becomes expensive. Implement file-watcher or cache based on file hashes (already generated) to only re-scan changed files. This would enable real-time IDE integration and make system viable for large codebases. Second review specifically noted this as priority for enterprise adoption.

items.title: Add minimal UI layer for graph exploration
items.close_reason: Duplicate of IMP-CORE-056. Consolidated into 056 with updated my-code tenant scope.
items.body: Duplicate entry - see IMP-CORE-056 for canonical tracking.

items.title: Implement findSimilar() in semantic-search service
items.body: semantic-search.ts:findSimilar() throws 'Not yet implemented - requires vector store fetch by ID'. This method would enable 'find similar code to this function' feature. Requires adding vectorStore.fetchById() method to retrieve embeddings by coderef, then performing similarity search against that embedding.

items.title: Implement getRelated() with graph integration
items.body: semantic-search.ts:getRelated() throws 'Not yet implemented - requires graph integration'. This method would combine semantic similarity with graph relationships (imports, calls, extends) to find related code elements. Requires integrating with graph-builder to traverse relationships and merge with vector similarity scores.

items.title: Replace console.log with Logger in conversation-manager
items.body: conversation-manager.ts:409 uses console.log for session cleanup messages. Should use the proper Logger utility from src/utils/logger.ts for consistency with rest of codebase and to enable configurable log levels.

items.title: rag-index exits 0 when all embeddings fail due to provider unreachable
items.close_reason: Fixed exit logic to check both chunksFailed AND result.errors.length. Exit code now properly reflects failure when any errors occur, enabling CI to detect failed indexing runs.
items.body: With Ollama daemon down and --provider=ollama, rag-index reports Chunks indexed: 0 and exits with code 0. Same failure mode is non-deterministically classified as chunksSkipped vs chunksFailed across runs. The exit guard at rag-index.ts:492 only checks chunksFailed, so when transport errors land in chunksSkipped the CLI silently reports success. Any CI/orchestration layer trusting $? cannot distinguish a totally-failed run from a healthy index.

items.title: Add Pinecone and Chroma vector store support
items.close_reason: Completed: PineconeStore and ChromaStore implemented with full VectorStore interface. CLI wired with --store flag. Unit tests added. Dependencies installed.
items.body: Current RAG system only supports SQLite vector store. Pinecone and Chroma providers are referenced in CLI help but not implemented. Need to complete: PineconeStore with namespace support, ChromaStore with collection management. Both should implement VectorStore interface with initialize(), add(), search(), clear(), stats() methods. Enables production deployments with scalable vector databases.
